title: Application Component (Service) Attribute Schema
description: Attributes for a 'service' application component: a deployable service.

Programming Languages & Versions.description: One entry per language, including version.

Frameworks & Versions.description: One entry per framework, including version.

Communication Protocols & Versions.description: One entry per protocol, including version.

Source Repository.description: Where the code lives. Informative only — declared as format: uri, but the validator runs no format checker, so any string is accepted.

Lifecycle State.description: Portfolio lifecycle stage of this component.
